title: Iced Briny Spanish Fish Bouillabaisse
description: A cold Spanish fish soup originating from the Mediterranean, featuring a unique combination of flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: Fish broth
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium broth for this recipe

instructions: Combine fish broth, sugar, kombu, and cold extract in a large pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat and add shrimp, scallop, anchovy, leek, garlic, red pepper, and fennel to the pot.
Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Strain the soup through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, discarding the solids.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate the soup for at least 2 hours, or until chilled.
Serve the soup cold, garnished with a sprinkle of olive oil and a side of crusty bread.
